caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap and a red hoodie speaks toward the camera while parked at a gas station. In the background, a "CIRCLE K" sign and a "V-Pow" sign are visible, along with several parked cars and a line of trees. The scene transitions to a first-person perspective from inside a vehicle, showing a grey hood and a paved area with red circular markings on the ground. A sign with the "CIRCLE K" logo is visible in the distance. The view then shifts to the interior of the car, showing the dashboard and a steering wheel. The digital instrument cluster displays a red needle and text that includes "Press any button to unlock," while the speedometer is visible on the right.
